title: MapReduce Delegation Token Management
description:
The 'security/token/delegation' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture is responsible for managing MapReduce-specific delegation tokens. The core functionality is encapsulated in the 'DelegationTokenSecretManager.java' file, which defines a class for managing these tokens' lifecycle, including creation, renewal, and removal. 

The 'DelegationTokenSelector.java' file introduces a specialized delegation token class for MapReduce jobs, ensuring secure access control. These components collaborate to provide a secure mechanism for MapReduce jobs to access HDFS, preventing unauthorized access while allowing legitimate tasks to proceed without interruption. This directory implements a specific instance of the 'Manager' pattern, where 'DelegationTokenSecretManager' acts as the manager for MapReduce delegation tokens, ensuring secure and controlled access in the Hadoop MapReduce framework.
